address: No. 139, Aero Gardens Estate, Kyami, Airport Road, Abuja, Nigeria
heroHeading: Delivering Care To Those Communities Who Need It.
heroDescription: Healthcare, clean water, education, and protection — delivering integrated lifesaving programs to Nigeria's most vulnerable communities since 2019.
aboutBody: Volunteering offers opportunities to develop new skills and gain valuable experience — including leadership, communication, project management, and teamwork skills.
